exercises.title: Encrypt a File
exercises.description: Use a CLI tool to encrypt and decrypt a small file with a symmetric key.
exercises.expected_outcome: The original file can be recovered only with the correct key.

exercises.title: Compare Cipher Modes
exercises.description: Encrypt the same data in ECB, CBC, and GCM and compare the outputs.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can see why some modes leak structure or provide authentication.

exercises.title: Write a File Vault
exercises.description: Build a tiny encrypt/decrypt utility that stores ciphertext on disk and derives keys from a password.
exercises.expected_outcome: Files are encrypted at rest and only decrypt with the correct secret.

exercises.title: Add Authenticated Encryption
exercises.description: Update the vault to verify integrity before decrypting the payload.
exercises.expected_outcome: Tampered ciphertext fails verification before plaintext is exposed.

exercises.title: Build a Key Rotation Flow
exercises.description: Create a runbook or script that rotates data-encryption keys without losing access.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can explain re-encryption, rollout, and rollback steps.

exercises.title: Design a Secret Storage Scheme
exercises.description: Design how to store, rotate, and access symmetric keys for an app safely.
exercises.expected_outcome: You have a practical scheme for secret distribution and rotation.
